examples.title: Abstract Class Example
examples.description: This code defines an abstract class called 'Vehicle' with an abstract method called 'drive'.
examples.explanation: This code defines an abstract class called 'Vehicle' with an abstract method called 'drive'. The 'Car' class inherits from the 'Vehicle' class and implements the 'drive' method.

examples.title: Interface Example
examples.description: This code defines an interface called 'Printable' with an abstract method called 'print'.
examples.explanation: This code defines an interface called 'Printable' with an abstract method called 'print'. The 'Document' class implements the 'Printable' interface and implements the 'print' method.
